title: Cobblemon PBG
description: The official modpack for Cobblemon PBG server.
body:
# Cobblemon PBG — Official Server Modpack

The official modpack for the **Cobblemon PBG** server. Lightweight, curated, and designed to get you playing fast — no bloat, no hassle.

## What's Included

* **Cobblemon** — the core Pokémon mod
* **Voice Chat** — built-in proximity voice chat with Simple Voice Chat
* **Performance Optimized** — Sodium, Lithium, Dynamic FPS & more for smooth gameplay
* **Optional Shaders** — Iris support with Complementary Shaders included
* **Minimap & Navigation** — Xaero's Minimap and World Map for easy exploration
* **Inventory Tools** — Chest Tracker, Shulker Box Tooltip, JEI & Crafting Tweaks
* **Enhanced Cobblemon UI** — improved party display, battle extras & interact wheel additions
* **Quality of Life** — Jade block info, AppleSkin hunger display, Zoomify, emoji support & more
* **Custom Main Menu** — branded PBG experience from the moment you launch

## The Server

Cobblemon PBG is a feature-rich, **strictly non–pay-to-win** Cobblemon server with NPC gyms, hourly raids, a player-driven economy, ranked PvP, and much more. Check our server listing or [wiki](https://wiki.parkballgang.com/) for the full feature breakdown.

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/5RSdtwEAnf
